ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for petitioner San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that his investigators looked at the boxes, which held old books and papers of no value. The Court granted the petition for final distribution, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
